# rh-ssg-structure

Review Red Hat documentation for SSG structural compliance — admonitions (NOTE/IMPORTANT/WARNING/TIP only, no CAUTION, no clustering, modules never start with admonitions), lead-in sentences (only when needed after Prerequisites/Procedure headings), prerequisites (written as completed states not imperative commands), and short descriptions/abstracts (2-3 sentences, customer-centric, no self-referential language). Use this skill when checking Red Hat docs for admonition usage, prerequisite formatting, short descriptions, or structural compliance. Takes precedence over ibm-sg-structure-and-format for Red Hat content.


**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
/rh-ssg-structure
```
